title: Tasks marked done auto delete from calendar
excerpt: Once a task is marked done, add automation to delete from google calendar.

posts.author: KaityBrosnan (Kaity Brosnan)
posts.cookedHtml: Once a task is marked done, add automation to delete from google calendar.

posts.author: YashGarg (Yash Garg)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @KaityBrosnan ,

We recently launched the app Google Calendar Sync - monday.com App Marketplace, which allows you to configure item/event based deletion rules, so that when item is deleted from board (or status is changed to Done), linked event will be deleted. It should fit your use case perfectly.

Other Features

  1. Ability to select any calendar instead of default one
  2. Ability to create event on status column change
  3. Ability to configure realtime 1-way sync and 2-way sync as per need
  4. Ability to send invites to team members and guests from monday itself
